trails.name: Short walk
trails.description: The walking only Lookout Track off Giant Moa Track, on the NE edge of park

trails.name: Combined mtb and walk
trails.description: Te Araroa, excluding the part that co-exists with the Schlaepfer Track

trails.name: Combined mtb and walk
trails.description: Schlaepfer track, excluding section that is a co-track with Te Araroa

trails.name: Waihao river walkway
trails.description: Waihao River Walkway can be accessed from the Black Hole camping area off Mt Harris Road in the west, 13km southwest of Waimate and from Waikakahi Valley Road at the east end.

trails.name: Pyramid Track
trails.description: An access easement to the Ben Ohau Range, Darts Bush Stream and Flanagan Pass.

trails.name: Hook Bush Route
trails.description: Enjoy expansive views out across the Canterbury Plain along an marked route up into The Hunters Hills.

trails.name: Maryburn Stream Track
trails.description: This track gives access to Maryburn Stream, or carry on further to Simons Hill.

trails.name: Benmore Peninsula Walk
trails.description: This circuit track passes through an exotic forest and around a peninsula jutting out into Lake Benmore.

trails.name: Gunns Bush Track
trails.description: Walk along an enchanting moss carpet.

trails.name: Mt Nimrod Track
trails.description: Walk to a cascading waterfall and enjoy gorgeous views out to the coast.

trails.name: Cowans Hill Track
trails.description: The track passes through exotic forest, open tussock country and past small tarns where wetland birds may stop to feed. It is suitable for walkers and mountain bikers.

trails.name: Rhoboro Track
trails.description: Climb along Darts Bush Stream.

trails.name: Pyramid Track
trails.description: An access easement to the Ben Ohau Range, Darts Bush Stream and Flanagan Pass.

trails.name: Marker Bay Track
trails.description: An easy walk for families through pine trees and the area where the Lake Pukaki village once stood.

trails.name: Twizel river trail
trails.description: This is a lovely walk alongside Twizel River.

trails.name: Baikie hut track
trails.description: Baikie Hut makes a great picnic or overnight venue.

trails.name: Deep Stream Track
trails.description: Walk within a flooded canyon to a shady picnic or fishing spot near Lake Aviemore in the Waitaki Valley.

trails.name: Kelceys Bush tracks
trails.description: Stroll to a small waterfall or picnic along a sparkling stream and listen to the bird song.

trails.name: Otamatakou Track
trails.description: Follow an old farm track to the reserve which contains remnant native shrubs.

trails.name: Pukaki Flats walk
trails.description: The Pukaki Flats walk goes over an open block of hard tussock grasslands just north of Twizel. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: Pukaki Kettle Hole Track
trails.description: Explore the Pukaki kettle holes and enjoy the great views of the lake and surrounding mountains.
